Development of anti-NPM1c-specific T-cell receptors using a humanized TCR mouse model

Xiaoxuan Liu, Qunwei Wang, Yizhou Yu…, Sarah A. Teichmann, Allan Bradley and George S. Vassiliou

Predicted TCR:pMHC structures — three confirmed binders vs high-PAE partners. Drag to rotate · scroll to zoom.

Data, analysis scripts and predicted structures are available at github.com/izu0421/NPM1c_TCRpMHC

1 · Model confidence (pLDDT)

pLDDT low high  (red 50 → white 70 → blue 90). Left column = binder, right column = highest-PAE partner for the same peptide.

2 · TCR binding interactions

Chains TCRα TCRβ peptide MHC  |  Bonds salt bridge H-bond disulfide hydrophobic
Use the buttons on each panel to show TCR–peptide, TCR–MHC, or both sets of interactions.

3 · Detected bond list

Every geometrically detected TCR↔pMHC bond across the three binders (one row per atom pair). Shorter distances are stronger. Colours match the bond dashes above.
